visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young man and woman stand in an outdoor plaza in front of a dark, modern building. The woman wears a tan cable-knit sweater, a fur-trimmed shawl, and brown shorts with tall black boots, holding a pink phone. The man wears a black puffer jacket over a tan sweater and gray trousers; his face is partially obscured by a black heart emoji. They hold hands and look in opposite directions. (2) An animation clip from Tom and Jerry shows Jerry leading a smaller gray mouse (Tuffy) by the hand, both looking back toward a table with a white cloth. (3) The real couple mimics the animation, holding hands and looking back over their shoulders while standing on the paved plaza. (4) A second animation clip features Jerry looking at a white piece of paper while Tuffy stands beside him wearing a yellow nightcap and red scarf. (5) The couple mimics this second pose; the woman smiles at the camera while the man stands slightly behind her, gesturing with one hand.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 情侶合照小技巧. [Variety]: 🐹 JERRY POSE 🐭.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male partner with a heart emoji over his face.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman in stylish autumn fashion (cable-knit sweater, fur shawl, shorts, tall boots) and a young man in a black puffer jacket and gray trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary background is a flat, paved outdoor plaza with a dark brown/black textured building facade. Some greenery and white circular planters are visible in the distance. The animation segments feature classic cartoon interior backgrounds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy pop music with an electronic remix beat and female vocals begins immediately. The track has a bright spectral texture and a consistent 4/4 time signature. (2) A sharp, melodic 'pop' or 'ding' sound effect occurs, punctuating the transition between real-life and animated segments. The music volume remains high. (3) The electronic beat continues with prominent synth bass and percussive hits. Another 'pop' sound effect is heard as the visuals switch back to the real couple. (4) The track reaches a vocal hook section, maintaining its upbeat and joyful tone. No speech or environmental noise is present throughout the sequence.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To demonstrate and promote a cute photography pose for couples ('Jerry Pose') by comparing real-life modeling to classic cartoon movements, aiming for viral engagement and lifestyle inspiration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While brands are visible, the primary intent is lifestyle content and trend participation.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a split-concept montage, successfully bridging nostalgic animation with modern social media photography trends.
